22. The above position was re-iterated in Dhanna etc. v. State of Madhya Pradesh (AIR 1996 SC 2478). 1996 Indlaw SC 2240
23. Section 34 IPC has clear application to the facts of the case on all fours, and seems to have been rightly and properly applied also.
24. Looked at from any angle, judgment of the High Court does not suffer from any infirmity to warrant interference. The appeals fail and are dismissed.
Appeal dismissed
